series_metadata.series_title: OCC''s Yearly Calculation of Utility Assessments & Ohio Utility Annual Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Used to record Ohio Utility Annual intrastate gross reciepts are used for the calculation of utility assessments.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Upon reciept, Ohio Utility Annual Reports are retained for 2 years then destroyed. ; Electronic: Information from the reports are added to an online spreadsheet for OCC''s yearly calculation of Utility Assessments and retained in the OCC electronic system for 10 years., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
